title: PhD
biography: Francoise Barre-Sinoussi is a French virologist who co-discovered HIV, the virus that causes AIDS. Nobel Prize 2008.
aiSummary: Francoise Barre-Sinoussi is a virology specialist at Pasteur Institute. Based in Paris.
